title: Building Your Lab 💻
description: Setting up a safe space to practice hacking (Home Labs).

slides.title: The Safe Zone 🛡️
slides.content:
### Don't Hack the Real World

The safest way to learn is to build your own mini-network. This is called a **Home Lab**. 

You can use a **Hypervisor** (like VirtualBox or VMware) to run multiple 'virtual' computers inside your own laptop without any risk.

slides.title: Your Arsenal ⚔️
slides.content:
### The Attack Machine

Download **Kali Linux**. It comes pre-installed with almost every tool we've mentioned: Nmap, Metasploit, Hashcat, and Burp Suite.

slides.title: The Victim 🎯
slides.content:
### The Target Machine

Don't hack your own laptop! Download **Metasploitable**. It's a Linux machine that is *intentionally* full of holes for you to practice finding and exploiting.

quizData.question: What is the primary benefit of using Virtual Machines for hacking practice?

options.text: They allow you to practice attacks in an isolated, safe environment without breaking your real computer

quizData.explanation: Isolation is key. What happens in the VM stays in the VM.
